description_long: This object is a large, rectangular awning structure attached to a building, featuring a prominent terracotta-tiled roof and multiple covered outdoor seating areas. The front facade is defined by two wide, black awnings extending over a patio with planters and tables, supported by a metal frame. The side view reveals a plain beige wall with a single door and additional awning coverage, while the rear view shows a simpler elevation with a window and two more awnings above smaller patios. The awning canopies are solid black and beige, with straight edges and no visible decorative trim. The support structure consists of fixed metal frames and posts, providing stability and coverage for the outdoor spaces. There is no visible branding or signage on any part of the awning or building.
description: A large, fixed awning structure with a terracotta-tiled roof, black and beige canopies, and metal frames covering outdoor seating areas. The design is solid and functional, with straight-edged canopies and no visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows two wide black awnings over a patio with planters and tables, supported by a metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain beige wall with a single door and extended awning coverage, minimal decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a window with two smaller awnings above patios, and a central blue door or window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a solid black wall with a single horizontal window and partial awning coverage.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the facade and roof of a building, covering outdoor patio areas
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed metal frame with posts and beams
